# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Experience wearable art where industrial design meets ancient origami craft. Unique handmade jewelry by Liya Kaplan at Tel Aviv&#39;s Nachlat Binyamin art fair.

### Meet Liya
https://example.com/meet-liya
From 20 years in industrial design to creating handmade origami jewelry. Discover Liya Kaplan&#39;s journey into wearable art and her unique design philosophy.

### Origami Process
https://example.com/origami-process
Explore the intricate process of transforming traditional origami into hand crafted jewellery. Each piece is meticulously folded and crafted by hand.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Find Liya Kaplan&#39;s handmade jewelry at Nachlat Binyamin art fair in Tel Aviv. Get in touch to learn about unique origami jewelry pieces and custom orders.
